positive: Minimalist, highly stylized vector illustration of a majestic mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The mountains should be rendered with clean, geometric forms and varying layers of deep blue, purple, and burnt orange. Incorporate stylized constellations and abstract celestial bodies (moons, stars) peeking over the peaks. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Use negative space effectively to enhance the celestial and rugged themes. Style: Modern vector art, flat design, high contrast, pop-art aesthetic. Lighting: Backlit, dramatic glow from the horizon.
